Sub:   Link of Transcript of Investor Conference 
  
Dear Sir/Madam, 
  
This is in continuation to our letter dated November 2, 2023. In this regard, please 
find below link of Transcript of Investor Conference held on Tuesday, November 2, 
2023. 
  
 https://www.iglonline.net/uploads/announcement/Transcript_of_earning_call_-_Q2_2023-24.pdf  
  
This is in compliance of Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure 
Requirements) Regulations, 2015. 
  
Yours sincerely, 
for Indraprastha Gas Limited, 
  
  
  
 
(S. K. Jain) 
Company Secretary & Compliance Officer
